task_description: Implement S44H (Top Bar Redesign All Platforms), S44I (Light/Dark Theme Polish), and S44J (Keyboard + Touch Enhancements) for the Mio Flutter chat app.

verification.summary: Flutter SDK not available in sandbox. All verification done via manual file inspection. Review fixes applied: (1) kIsWeb guard added to prevent web platform crash in chat_screen.dart and chat_bubble.dart, (2) double haptic on failed send fixed by moving haptic/clear after validation, (3) dead theme files wired by making app_theme.dart delegate to LightTheme/DarkTheme, (4) rename async safety fixed by capturing Navigator reference before await.
